message:
refactor(cli): update all commands to use getClient helper

Update all remaining CLI commands to use the new getClient() helper
for daemon connection, providing consistent URL resolution across
the entire CLI. This enables remote connections via --url flag or
STOCKYARD_URL environment variable.

Commands updated:
- run, stop, restart, destroy
- attach, logs, cp (still use config for VM.User)
- snapshot, snapshots, restore
- gc (loadTasks method)
- resources (collectFromDaemon method)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,7 +8,6 @@ import (
 	"os/exec"
 	"strings"
 
-	"github.com/obra/stockyard/pkg/client"
 	"github.com/obra/stockyard/pkg/config"
 	"github.com/spf13/cobra"
 )
@@ -29,16 +28,16 @@ var cpCmd = &cobra.Command{
 		taskID := parts[0]
 		remotePath := parts[1]
 
-		cfg, err := config.Load()
+		c, err := getClient()
 		if err != nil {
 			return err
 		}
+		defer c.Close()
 
-		c, err := client.New(cfg.Daemon.SocketPath)
+		cfg, err := config.Load()
 		if err != nil {
-			return fmt.Errorf("failed to connect to daemon: %w\nIs stockyardd running?", err)
+			return err
 		}
-		defer c.Close()
 
 		task, err := c.GetTask(context.Background(), taskID)
 		if err != nil {
